# .NET Version Upgrade Progress

## Overview

Upgrading LegacyWebForms from ASP.NET WebForms (net472) to ASP.NET Core Razor Pages (net10.0). The project uses a legacy project format and requires SDK-style conversion followed by a full framework migration. Strategy: All-at-Once.

**Progress**: 0/4 tasks complete <progress value="0" max="100"></progress> 0%

## Tasks

- 🔲 01-prerequisites: Verify upgrade prerequisites
- 🔲 02-sdk-conversion: Convert project to SDK-style format
- 🔲 03-aspnetcore-migration: Migrate to ASP.NET Core Razor Pages on .NET 10
- 🔲 04-final-validation: Final build and validation
